app.empty_hint_body: Pick or create a workspace first — every document and case lives inside one.

sidebar.footer: Not a medical device. Decisions remain with the clinician.

onboarding.subtitle: Local-first clinical decision support · v0.1
onboarding.body: Conclave is an experimental clinical decision-support tool. It is <0>not a medical device</0> and does <1>not replace the judgement of a qualified clinician</1>. Outputs may be incomplete, biased or wrong. Always validate recommendations against primary sources and institutional protocols before acting on them.
onboarding.privacy_body: Before sending a case or any attached file to the AI, Conclave automatically removes patient names, dates, national IDs (DNI/NIE), medical record numbers, phone numbers, email addresses and ages above 89. Conclave runs locally: your documents are never sent to a Conclave server.
onboarding.ack: By continuing you acknowledge that you have read and understood the above and accept full responsibility for clinical decisions.

workspaces.empty: No workspaces yet. Create your first one from the button above.
workspaces.no_active: No active workspace · pick one below
workspaces.create_subtitle: Each workspace gets its own SQLite + vector store
workspaces.field_specialty_hint: Pick from the list or type your own — used to guide the LLM.
workspaces.field_language_hint: ISO code · used by the verdict prompt

knowledge.pick_folder_title: Pick a folder to add (includes subfolders)
knowledge.ingest_warming: Preparing the search engine — first run downloads ~470 MB.
knowledge.empty_docs: No documents yet. Add a PDF, DOCX, TXT, MD or HTML — or drop it here.
knowledge.confirm_remove: Remove this document and its fragments?
knowledge.privacy_warning: <0>For guidelines, protocols and references only.</0> Do not upload patient documents here — those belong in the Cases tab, where they are automatically de-identified before being sent to the AI.
knowledge.dropzone_hint: You can also drag files and folders here

qa.title: Ask your documents
qa.subtitle: The AI answers citing the relevant snippets from your knowledge base.
qa.field_question_placeholder: e.g. What is the first-line management of KRAS-mutant metastatic colorectal cancer?
qa.no_provider: Connect an AI in Settings to ask your documents.
qa.empty_workspace: Add at least one document before asking.
qa.general_knowledge_label: Let the AI use its general knowledge if the documents aren't enough
qa.general_knowledge_hint: The answer will clearly flag what comes from the documents and what from the model. No internet access.

cases.empty_title: No cases yet. Run your first virtual committee.
cases.deliberation_overlay_done_subtitle: Tap View verdict to open the case or Close to stay on the list.
cases.new_subtitle: Paste a clinical note — it will be de-identified before any LLM call
cases.field_text_placeholder: 67-year-old woman with progressive dyspnea and lower-limb edema…
cases.provider_empty_body: Connect an AI provider to run the committee.
cases.deid_subtitle: Layer A regex + Layer C heuristics
cases.deid_hint: Paste a case on the left and hit <0>Preview de-id</0> to see exactly what will leave this device.
cases.privacy_banner: <0>Patient data is protected.</0> Before sending the case or any attachment to the AI, we automatically remove names, dates, national IDs, medical record numbers, phone numbers and email addresses.
cases.no_verdict: No verdict on file for this case.
cases.no_verdict_failed: The committee could not produce a verdict — see the error above.
cases.provider_offline_warning: {{name}} isn't responding. If it's Ollama, start `ollama serve`. If it's a cloud provider, check your connection or pick another one.
cases.delete_confirm_body: This permanently removes the case, its verdict and any attachments. This cannot be undone.
cases.delete_confirm_body_plural: This permanently removes {{count}} cases, their verdicts and any attachments. This cannot be undone.
cases.attachments_drop_hint: Drop files here or use Browse — labs, images, PDFs. <0>Scoped to this case only</0>, never added to the knowledge base.
cases.attachment_needs_ocr_hint: No text could be extracted; only vision-capable providers will interpret this file.
cases.attachment_no_text_explanation: No text was extracted. The file is preserved and vision-capable LLMs (Claude, GPT-4o) will be able to interpret it directly.
cases.attachments_section_subtitle: Files supplied specifically for this patient
cases.drop_overlay_title: Drop the files to attach them to the case
cases.drop_overlay_hint: The new-case form will open with the files pre-loaded.
cases.drop_overlay_multi_hint: A dialog will open to split files into distinct patient cases.
cases.classify_dialog_subtitle: We grouped by name. Drag files between cards to adjust.
cases.classify_dialog_drop_new_card: Drop here for a new case
cases.classify_dialog_remove_case_confirm: This card has {{count}} file(s). Remove it from the batch?
cases.classify_dialog_disabled_no_provider: No provider configured. Open Settings and connect one.
cases.classify_dialog_run_fallback_to_drafts: I saved the cases as drafts; open them one by one and run them once you connect a provider.
cases.classify_dialog_chip_drag_hint: Drag to another card to move · {{path}}
cases.draft_banner_body: Add clinical context if you want and press "Run committee" when ready.
cases.deliberative_toggle_subtitle: Briefing → draft → critique → final verdict. Slower and more tokens, but the answer is more rigorous.
cases.deliberation_overlay_subtitle: Four passes over the evidence. Expand any phase to follow along.

deliberation_phase.briefing_subtitle: Reading every source and producing a structured briefing.
deliberation_phase.drafting_subtitle: First-pass verdict written from the briefing.
deliberation_phase.redteam_subtitle: Hunting for missed alternatives, overreach, and gaps.
deliberation_phase.finalize_subtitle: Consolidating the critique into the final JSON.

cases.deliberation_vision_used: The model received the attached images directly (vision enabled).
cases.process_folder_empty: The selected folder contains no recognisable cases.

settings.interface_subtitle: Language and theme · each workspace keeps its own verdict language
settings.ai_subtitle_empty: Connect a provider — you can change it whenever you want
settings.ai_subtitle_active: One AI active at a time · switch whenever you want
settings.picker_group_oauth_caption: Unofficial path — Anthropic and OpenAI may revoke access without notice.
settings.picker_group_api_caption: Official, stable path. Pay-per-use billed directly by the provider.
settings.apple_intel_ready: is ready on your Mac for utility tasks (titles, batches, summaries). Never used for clinical deliberation.
settings.apple_intel_unavailable_not_enabled: becomes available once you turn on Apple Intelligence in System Settings.
settings.apple_intel_unavailable_downloading: is finishing its on-device model download — try again in a few minutes.
settings.ollama_running: is running on your Mac and you can use it from the cases screen without connecting anything.
settings.ollama_pending: becomes available automatically when you run it on your Mac — no connection, no keys required.
settings.ollama_secondary: Ollama (local) is also available for offline cases.
settings.apikey_field_hint: Stored in the system keychain. Never written to disk as plain text.
settings.oauth_flow_disclaimer: This connection reuses the official CLI OAuth flow. It is not an integration supported by the provider — access can be revoked or your account sanctioned at any time. For continuous clinical use, the recommended path is an API key.
settings.oauth_active_caption: Subscription mode · subject to provider changes without notice.
settings.oauth_error_revoked: Your session with {{name}} is no longer valid. The provider may have revoked access to unofficial OAuth clients. Reconnect, or switch to an API key for a stable connection.
settings.oauth_anthropic_fallback: Open the browser, authorize Conclave, then paste here the code Anthropic gives you.
settings.oauth_openai_waiting_body: Complete sign-in and come back here — Conclave will detect the connection automatically.
settings.oauth_openai_trouble_hint: If your default browser doesn't load the page or the redirect fails, copy the URL and paste it in the browser where you're signed into ChatGPT — the localhost redirect will still reach Conclave.
settings.migration_title: Conclave now uses one AI at a time
settings.migration_body: We detected several active connections. Pick which one to keep — the others will be disconnected from your local account.
settings.keychain_note: Keys are stored in the system keychain · never in config files
